professionalSummary.intro: Senior software engineer with 15+ years of experience building scalable backend systems and leading cross-functional engineering teams. Currently serving as Engineering Manager at Carousell, where I lead Golang-based microservices development for e-commerce platforms serving millions of users.
keyStrengths: Building production microservices and event-driven architectures for high-traffic platforms
Technical lead experience across full project lifecycle: architecture design, requirements definition, implementation, and deployment
Strong backend engineering background with AWS/GCP cloud infrastructure, gRPC APIs, and distributed systems design
Proven track record in RDBMS and KVS schema design, having architected data models for enterprise and e-commerce platforms
Experienced in team leadership, cross-functional collaboration with product managers and designers, and mentoring engineers

careerHighlights: Built and led Golang microservices for Carousell's inventory-sync platform, processing 100K+ daily inventory updates between merchants and Shopify
Architected event-driven trust and safety systems for fraud detection, handling high-volume transaction processing at scale
Led migration of legacy Python services to Golang microservices, improving system reliability and maintainability
Managed cross-functional team of 6 engineers across QA, Backend, Web, iOS, and Android for Carousell's core platform
Designed and implemented scalable backend architectures for e-commerce platforms serving millions of users across Southeast Asia
Technical Architect for SoBanHang's frontend systems, enabling rapid growth in Vietnam's competitive e-commerce market
